expect.error: basePremium must be > 0 — your underwriting estimate

invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.quotes.every(q => Number.isFinite(q.annualPremium) && Number.isFinite(q.commission) && Number.isFinite(q.fitScore))
contracts.name: carrier-rate

invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.payout.splits.reduce((a, s) => a + s.sparks, 0) === output.result.payout.totalSparks
contracts.name: pact-record-payout
